mapper.select: SELECT * FROM in_app_messages WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO in_app_messages (user_id, title, body, msg_type, read_flag, ref_type, ref_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{body}, #{msgType}, #{readFlag}, #{refType}, #{refId})
mapper.update: UPDATE in_app_messages SET read_flag = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE in_app_messages SET read_flag = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_flag = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM in_app_messages WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_flag = 0
